prose:
**Formaldehyde frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit RIJK) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz`, single-point (no geometry optimization at DFT level). SCF converged in 8 cycles; no warnings reported.  
HOMO = −7.6523067 eV  
LUMO = −1.7826355 eV  
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.8696712 eV  

Command run:  
`/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 --out formaldehyde_frontier.json`  

Result JSON: `formaldehyde_frontier.json`  
integrity.trustworthy: true
